prompt: A hilarious, extreme 0.5x wide-angle low selfie looking up, ruined by a pet. An enormous fluffy orange cat presses its giant pink nose and whiskers directly against the camera, filling most of the frame in soft blurry detail. Behind the cat, a cheerful young woman with shoulder-length dark hair wears a cozy cream knitted sweater, laughing helplessly. They are sitting inside a warm aesthetic café filled with wooden furniture, hanging plants, pastries, and soft golden afternoon light. Curved perspective, casual slice-of-life, candid moment, high ISO smartphone photography, natural imperfections.
promptEn: A hilarious, extreme 0.5x wide-angle low selfie looking up, ruined by a pet. An enormous fluffy orange cat presses its giant pink nose and whiskers directly against the camera, filling most of the frame in soft blurry detail. Behind the cat, a cheerful young woman with shoulder-length dark hair wears a cozy cream knitted sweater, laughing helplessly. They are sitting inside a warm aesthetic café filled with wooden furniture, hanging plants, pastries, and soft golden afternoon light. Curved perspective, casual slice-of-life, candid moment, high ISO smartphone photography, natural imperfections.
promptZh: 一张滑稽的 0.5 倍超广角仰拍自拍，被一只 宠物 乱入。一只巨大的 毛茸茸的橘猫 将它硕大的粉色鼻子和胡须直接贴在镜头上，占据了画面大部分区域，呈现出柔和模糊的细节。在猫咪身后，一位 留着齐肩黑发、神情愉悦的年轻女性 穿着舒适的米色针织毛衣，正无奈地大笑。他们坐在一家温馨的咖啡馆里，店内摆满了木质家具、悬挂的绿植和糕点，沐浴在午后柔和的金色阳光中。弯曲的透视效果，随意的生活片段，抓拍瞬间，高 ISO 智能手机摄影风格，带有自然的瑕疵感。
